title: Better Elytra Flying
description: When you are flying with an elytra or take off, you can click space to quick use a firework in your hotbar.
body:
# Better Elytra Flying
### Makes flying with an elytra easier
When you take off with an elytra, or click space bar while flying, it finds a firework in your hotbar and uses it. If there are no fireworks, it does nothing. You can rebind it in settings.
